name: Girls Hostel
description:
If you're looking for a safe and comfortable Girls' Hostel for doctors, students and working women at the best location of Karachi City, then look no more. 

We are offering the best rooms with unique features, which include furnished rooms with attached bath, kitchen & lounge. This one-of-its kind facility is equipped with internet connectivity,  refrigerator, and comes with the provision of 24 hours electricity/ and daily room maintenance. The rent is inclusive of all utility bills and the aforementioned facilities. 
The hostel includes  two-bed sharing rooms at a very reasonable price, only on 1 moth security deposit. The hostel, which offers a safe and home-like environment, is ideally located near Imtiaz Super Store and Super Marts. Please contact us for further details.
